overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment with elevated highways, industrial structures, and corporate buildings under bright midday sun. The character traverses sunlit sidewalks and shaded underpasses while approaching a massive industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit sidewalk beneath elevated highway interchange

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward an intersection, passing palm trees and utility structures

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with multiple levels casting shadows below
group of palm trees growing along the sidewalk edge near the street
large metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines
small beige concrete structure with metal doors and graffiti on the side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway interchange. Palm trees line the left side while a small utility building sits on the right. Power lines stretch across the sky, and the harsh midday sun creates strong shadows on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded intersection under highway overpass with corporate building view

events.description: enters deep shadow beneath the highway overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to shaded environment
crosses multi-lane street at marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while heading toward the large Arasaka building visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive black corporate building with illuminated white Arasaka logo on the facade
tall pole with traffic lights and street signs attached

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the shade beneath the highway overpass, approaching a wide intersection. The iconic Arasaka corporate building dominates the distant skyline. The character crosses the street with a group of pedestrians while a futuristic sedan drives past, transitioning from the sunlit approach to the shaded underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with industrial skyline

events.description: turns left to follow the sidewalk running parallel beneath the highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded sidewalk under the highway overpass, approaching distant industrial structures

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic industrial towers and refinery structures with smokestacks in the distance
large satellite dishes and communication equipment atop distant buildings
circular signs with American flag motif displaying '6th Street' mounted on concrete pillars
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the highway traffic below

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive highway structure, the character follows a long shaded sidewalk toward an industrial district. The 6th Street signs mark the route while distant refinery towers and satellite dishes rise against the horizon. Other pedestrians approach from the opposite direction along the enclosed walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched sidewalk into the deep shadows of a massive urban industrial underpass. It begins with the character walking along a concrete path lined with palm trees and utility buildings, where the harsh midday sun casts strong shadows beneath a towering highway interchange. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open sunlight into the shade of the overpass, crossing a wide intersection alongside pedestrians and a passing futuristic sedan with the Arasaka corporate building looming in the distance. The camera then follows the character deeper into the enclosed walkway, where the environment transitions into an industrial district marked by 6th Street signs. Finally, the path extends toward a horizon dominated by refinery towers and satellite dishes as other pedestrians approach from the opposite direction.
